description: GSD workflow hooks -- session context loading, workflow enforcement, tool-use monitoring, and security defense-in-depth. Hook commands use an inline Node resolver so they fall back to the newest cached plugin version when the session's baked ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} path has been pruned after an upgrade. Coexistence election (both plugin copies enabled at once): two shared dispatch points enforce a single-sourced run-vs-yield election so each merged hook fires exactly once. (1) bin/gsd-tools.cjs `case 'hook'` covers the four state-mutating branches session-start, post-tool-use, pre-compact, stop. (2) hooks/run-bash-hook.cjs covers the three bash hooks gsd-session-state.sh, gsd-validate-commit.sh, gsd-phase-boundary.sh (fires exactly once, literally). Any hook added through either dispatch is elected automatically. The un-elected entries are the standalone read-only advisory JS detectors (gsd-shadowing-sdk-detector.js, gsd-staleness-reminder.js, gsd-prompt-guard.js, gsd-workflow-guard.js, gsd-read-guard.js, gsd-auth-detector.js, gsd-read-injection-scanner.js, gsd-context-monitor.js), which mutate no shared state and are idempotent, so double-running under two copies is a no-op; a new detector-style hook must be added to this list.

hooks.command: node -e "const f=require('fs'),p=require('path'),o=require('os'),c=[];if(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT)c.push(p.join(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT,'bin/gsd-tools.cjs'));const b=p.join(o.homedir(),'.claude/plugins/cache'),g='bm',t=[];try{for(const m of f.readdirSync(b)){try{for(const v of f.readdirSync(p.join(b,m,g)))if(/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(v))t.push([v,p.join(b,m,g,v,'bin/gsd-tools.cjs')]);}catch(e){}}}catch(e){}t.sort((a,z)=>{const A=a[0].split('.').map(Number),B=z[0].split('.').map(Number);return B[0]-A[0]||B[1]-A[1]||B[2]-A[2];});for(const e of t)c.push(e[1]);for(const x of c){if(!f.existsSync(x))continue;if(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT&&x!==c[0])process.stderr.write('GSD: plugin path stale, using '+x+'\n');process.argv.splice(1,0,x);require(x);break;}" hook session-start

node -e "const f=require('fs'),p=require('path'),o=require('os'),cp=require('child_process'),c=[];if(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT)c.push(p.join(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT,'hooks/run-bash-hook.cjs'));const b=p.join(o.homedir(),'.claude/plugins/cache'),g='bm',t=[];try{for(const m of f.readdirSync(b)){try{for(const v of f.readdirSync(p.join(b,m,g)))if(/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(v))t.push([v,p.join(b,m,g,v,'hooks/run-bash-hook.cjs')]);}catch(e){}}}catch(e){}t.sort((a,z)=>{const A=a[0].split('.').map(Number),B=z[0].split('.').map(Number);return B[0]-A[0]||B[1]-A[1]||B[2]-A[2];});for(const e of t)c.push(e[1]);for(const x of c){if(!f.existsSync(x))continue;if(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT&&x!==c[0])process.stderr.write('GSD: plugin path stale, using '+x+'\n');const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,[x,'gsd-session-state.sh'],{stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status||0);}"

node -e "const f=require('fs'),p=require('path'),o=require('os'),c=[];if(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT)c.push(p.join(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT,'hooks/gsd-shadowing-sdk-detector.js'));const b=p.join(o.homedir(),'.claude/plugins/cache'),g='bm',t=[];try{for(const m of f.readdirSync(b)){try{for(const v of f.readdirSync(p.join(b,m,g)))if(/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(v))t.push([v,p.join(b,m,g,v,'hooks/gsd-shadowing-sdk-detector.js')]);}catch(e){}}}catch(e){}t.sort((a,z)=>{const A=a[0].split('.').map(Number),B=z[0].split('.').map(Number);return B[0]-A[0]||B[1]-A[1]||B[2]-A[2];});for(const e of t)c.push(e[1]);for(const x of c){if(!f.existsSync(x))continue;if(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT&&x!==c[0])process.stderr.write('GSD: plugin path stale, using '+x+'\n');process.argv.splice(1,0,x);require(x);break;}"
